zh.lifeSummary: 當William Brito Albini於1082年出生在法國諾門迪曼其沙吉馬-達奧比尼時，他的父親Main Albini27歲，母親Adeliza Amice Bohun23歲。他和Cecilia Bigod至少有3個兒子。他去世於1156年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾波泰斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Brito Albini于1082年出生在法国諾門迪曼其沙吉馬-達奧比尼时，他的父亲Main Albini27岁，母亲Adeliza Amice Bohun23岁。他和Cecilia Bigod至少有3个儿子。他去世于1156年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾波泰斯福德。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Pasquale, Aldo, Amalio, Americo, Armando, Carlo, Caterina, Claudio, Gino, Mario, Maurizio, Nichola, Nicola, Severino, Vittorio.
patronymic or plural form of   Albino  .

variants.name: Albino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ramon, Manuel, Ana, Carlos, Julio, Luis, Raul, Ruben, Alfonso, Andres, Angel.  Italian Pasquale, Angelo, Antonio, Carmine, Giovanni, Luigi, Sal, Santo, Saverio, Ubalda.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Brito
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: contracted form of Birgit ( see Bridget ), made famous in the English-speaking world by the Swedish actress Britt Ekland ( b. 1942 ; her surname was originally Eklund ).

variants.name: Birgit
meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

en.lifeSummary: When William Brito Albini was born in 1082, in Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandy, France, his father, Main Albini, was 27 and his mother, Adeliza Amice Bohun, was 23. He had at least 3 sons with Cecilia Bigod. He died in 1156, in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Bottesford, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Brito Albini est né en 1082, à Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Main Albini, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Amice Bohun, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Cecilia Bigod. Il est décédé en 1156, à Belvoir, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Bottesford, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Brito Albini 1082 in Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Main Albini 27 und seine Mutter Adeliza Amice Bohun 23. Er hatte mit Cecilia Bigod mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1156 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bottesford, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: William Brito Albiniが1082年にフランスノーマンディマンチェサイント-マルティン-ド'アウビグニーで生まれた時，父Main Albiniは27歳，母Adeliza Amice Bohunは23歳であった。彼はCecilia Bigodとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1156年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイルで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアボッテスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Brito Albini(이)가 1082년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 세인트-마틴-드'오비그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Main Albini(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Amice Bohun(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Cecilia Bigod(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1156년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벨보이르에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벗츠퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Brito Albini родился в 1082 г. в местности сеинт-мартин-д'аубигни, манч, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Main Albini было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Amice Bohun, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Cecilia Bigod. Он умер в 1156 г. в местности белвоир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности боттесфорд, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
